requirement_topic.en: Restricted Substances — No Horizontal RoHS in the Philippines; Chemical Control Instruments Instead
requirement_topic.zh: 限用物质——菲律宾无横向 RoHS；改以化学品管控制度
requirement_topic.zht: 限用物質——菲律賓無橫向 RoHS；改以化學品管控制度

summary.en: The Philippines does not have a single horizontal RoHS-style directive that restricts a fixed list of hazardous substances across all electrical and electronic equipment in the way the EU RoHS Directive does. Instead, hazardous-substance control is delivered through general chemical-management law: Republic Act No. 6969 (Toxic Substances and Hazardous and Nuclear Wastes Control Act of 1990) and its implementing rules, administered by the Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) through the Environmental Management Bureau (EMB), with the Priority Chemicals List (PCL) and Chemical Control Orders (CCOs) for specific substances such as mercury, lead, cadmium, and certain brominated compounds. Mercury, lead, and cadmium relevant to lighting are subject to CCOs / PCL controls rather than a per-product homogeneous-material concentration limit. Importers must ensure their products and components comply with any applicable CCO and PCL obligations and with import controls under RA 6969.
summary.zh: 菲律宾没有像欧盟 RoHS 指令那样、对所有电气电子设备限制固定有害物质清单的单一横向 RoHS 式指令。相反，有害物质管控通过一般化学品管理法实现：《共和国第 6969 号法》（1990 年有毒物质及有害和核废物管控法）及其实施细则，由环境与自然资源部（DENR）通过环境管理局（EMB）管理，并设有优先化学品清单（PCL）及针对特定物质（如汞、铅、镉及某些溴化物）的化学品管控令（CCO）。与照明相关的汞、铅、镉受 CCO / PCL 管控，而非按产品均质材料浓度限值管控。进口商须确保其产品及部件符合任何适用的 CCO 及 PCL 义务，并符合 RA 6969 下的进口管控。
summary.zht: 菲律賓沒有像歐盟 RoHS 指令那樣、對所有電氣電子設備限制固定有害物質清單的單一橫向 RoHS 式指令。相反，有害物質管控通過一般化學品管理法實現：《共和國第 6969 號法》（1990 年有毒物質及有害和核廢物管控法）及其實施細則，由環境與自然資源部（DENR）通過環境管理局（EMB）管理，並設有優先化學品清單（PCL）及針對特定物質（如汞、鉛、鎘及某些溴化物）的化學品管控令（CCO）。與照明相關的汞、鉛、鎘受 CCO / PCL 管控，而非按產品均質材料濃度限值管控。進口商須確保其產品及部件符合任何適用的 CCO 及 PCL 義務，並符合 RA 6969 下的進口管控。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 6969 — Toxic Substances and Hazardous and Nuclear Wastes Control Act of 1990 (DENR / EMB)
DENR Priority Chemicals List (PCL) and Chemical Control Orders (CCOs) — e.g. for mercury, lead, cadmium, certain brominated compounds

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original six RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS, together with China RoHS 2 (Management Measures, SJ/T 11364-2014) requiring a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS 2 is a per-product homogeneous-material disclosure-and-restriction regime — structurally different from the Philippine chemical-management approach, which controls substances at the chemical / import level rather than via a fixed EEE concentration table.
summary.zh: 中国对应制度为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原六项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同，并配合中国 RoHS 2（管理办法，SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙/绿）。中国 RoHS 2 是按产品均质材料的披露与限制制度——在结构上不同于菲律宾的化学品管理方式，后者在化学品/进口层面管控物质，而非通过固定的 EEE 浓度表。
summary.zht: 中國對應制度為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原六項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同，並配合中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法，SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙/綠）。中國 RoHS 2 是按產品均質材料的披露與限制制度——在結構上不同於菲律賓的化學品管理方式，後者在化學品/進口層面管控物質，而非通過固定的 EEE 濃度表。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — six substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: There is no Philippine horizontal RoHS directive, so a Chinese exporter cannot rely on either an EU-RoHS or a China-RoHS declaration to satisfy a single Philippine equivalent — there is none. Instead the gap is one of regime structure: (1) the manufacturer must screen for substances controlled under RA 6969 CCOs / PCL (notably mercury, lead, cadmium and certain brominated compounds relevant to LED components and solders) and ensure compliance with those chemical-level controls and import requirements; (2) China RoHS 2 disclosure labelling does not satisfy Philippine chemical-control obligations, and conversely the Philippines does not require the China-style orange/green disclosure label; (3) buyers and supply chains increasingly expect EU-RoHS-style substance declarations as a commercial norm even where not legally mandated. Manufacturers should treat restricted-substance compliance as substance/import-driven (RA 6969) rather than as a single product RoHS certificate, and verify which CCOs apply to their bill of materials.
gap.zh: 菲律宾没有横向 RoHS 指令，因此中国出口商不能依赖欧盟 RoHS 或中国 RoHS 声明来满足单一的菲律宾对应要求——因为并不存在这样的对应要求。差距在于制度结构：（1）制造商须筛查 RA 6969 下 CCO / PCL 管控的物质（尤其是与 LED 部件及焊料相关的汞、铅、镉及某些溴化物），并确保符合这些化学品层面的管控及进口要求；（2）中国 RoHS 2 披露标识不满足菲律宾化学品管控义务，反之菲律宾也不要求中国式的橙/绿披露标识；（3）即便法律未强制，买家及供应链作为商业惯例日益要求欧盟 RoHS 式的物质声明。制造商应将限用物质合规视为由物质/进口驱动（RA 6969），而非单一的产品 RoHS 证书，并核实哪些 CCO 适用于其物料清单。
gap.zht: 菲律賓沒有橫向 RoHS 指令，因此中國出口商不能依賴歐盟 RoHS 或中國 RoHS 聲明來滿足單一的菲律賓對應要求——因為並不存在這樣的對應要求。差距在於制度結構：（1）製造商須篩查 RA 6969 下 CCO / PCL 管控的物質（尤其是與 LED 部件及焊料相關的汞、鉛、鎘及某些溴化物），並確保符合這些化學品層面的管控及進口要求；（2）中國 RoHS 2 披露標識不滿足菲律賓化學品管控義務，反之菲律賓也不要求中國式的橙/綠披露標識；（3）即便法律未強制，買家及供應鏈作為商業慣例日益要求歐盟 RoHS 式的物質聲明。製造商應將限用物質合規視為由物質/進口驅動（RA 6969），而非單一的產品 RoHS 證書，並核實哪些 CCO 適用於其物料清單。

mandatory_status.target: No horizontal RoHS — substance control is via RA 6969 CCOs / PCL at the chemical / import level; applicable CCO and PCL obligations are mandatory but there is no fixed EEE concentration table or RoHS certificate requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers six substances

source.publisher: Environmental Management Bureau (EMB), Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR), Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Philippines has no horizontal RoHS directive — there is no single Philippine equivalent that an EU-RoHS or China-RoHS declaration satisfies. Hazardous-substance control is delivered through RA 6969 Chemical Control Orders and the Priority Chemicals List (mercury, lead, cadmium, certain brominated compounds), administered by DENR / EMB at the chemical and import level. Chinese exporters should screen their bill of materials against applicable CCOs / PCL rather than rely on a product RoHS certificate, and note that China RoHS 2 disclosure labelling does not satisfy Philippine obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾没有横向 RoHS 指令——不存在欧盟 RoHS 或中国 RoHS 声明可满足的单一菲律宾对应要求。有害物质管控通过 RA 6969 化学品管控令及优先化学品清单（汞、铅、镉、某些溴化物）实现，由 DENR / EMB 在化学品及进口层面管理。中国出口商应将其物料清单对照适用的 CCO / PCL 进行筛查，而非依赖产品 RoHS 证书，并注意中国 RoHS 2 披露标识不满足菲律宾义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓沒有橫向 RoHS 指令——不存在歐盟 RoHS 或中國 RoHS 聲明可滿足的單一菲律賓對應要求。有害物質管控通過 RA 6969 化學品管控令及優先化學品清單（汞、鉛、鎘、某些溴化物）實現，由 DENR / EMB 在化學品及進口層面管理。中國出口商應將其物料清單對照適用的 CCO / PCL 進行篩查，而非依賴產品 RoHS 證書，並注意中國 RoHS 2 披露標識不滿足菲律賓義務。

requirement_topic.en: E-Waste and End-of-Life — Hazardous Waste Handling for LED Products (RA 6969 / EMB)
requirement_topic.zh: 电子废物与产品报废——LED 产品的有害废物处理（RA 6969 / EMB）
requirement_topic.zht: 電子廢物與產品報廢——LED 產品的有害廢物處理（RA 6969 / EMB）

summary.en: In the Philippines, waste electrical and electronic equipment (WEEE), including end-of-life LED lamps and luminaires that contain or are contaminated with hazardous components, is regulated as hazardous waste under Republic Act No. 6969 and its implementing rules and the DENR / EMB hazardous-waste management framework (registration of generators, accredited transporters and treatment-storage-disposal facilities, and a manifest system). There is no single EU-WEEE-style extended-producer-responsibility (EPR) directive specific to lighting nationwide, but DENR guidance on WEEE and hazardous-waste handling applies, and the broader Extended Producer Responsibility Act (RA 11898, focused primarily on plastic packaging) signals a direction toward producer responsibility. Importers and distributors should plan for compliant disposal channels and any take-back expectations, and ensure mercury-containing or lead-bearing components are handled under the hazardous-waste rules.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾，废弃电气电子设备（WEEE），包括含有或被有害组件污染的报废 LED 灯及灯具，依据《共和国第 6969 号法》及其实施细则以及 DENR / EMB 有害废物管理框架（产废者登记、认可的运输者及处理-储存-处置设施、以及联单制度）作为有害废物管理。目前没有针对照明的全国性、欧盟 WEEE 式生产者延伸责任（EPR）单一指令，但 DENR 关于 WEEE 及有害废物处理的指引适用，而更广泛的《延伸生产者责任法》（RA 11898，主要聚焦塑料包装）显示出向生产者责任方向发展的趋势。进口商及经销商应规划合规的处置渠道及任何回收预期，并确保含汞或含铅组件按有害废物规则处理。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓，廢棄電氣電子設備（WEEE），包括含有或被有害組件污染的報廢 LED 燈及燈具，依據《共和國第 6969 號法》及其實施細則以及 DENR / EMB 有害廢物管理框架（產廢者登記、認可的運輸者及處理-儲存-處置設施、以及聯單制度）作為有害廢物管理。目前沒有針對照明的全國性、歐盟 WEEE 式生產者延伸責任（EPR）單一指令，但 DENR 關於 WEEE 及有害廢物處理的指引適用，而更廣泛的《延伸生產者責任法》（RA 11898，主要聚焦塑料包裝）顯示出向生產者責任方向發展的趨勢。進口商及經銷商應規劃合規的處置渠道及任何回收預期，並確保含汞或含鉛組件按有害廢物規則處理。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 6969 — Toxic Substances and Hazardous and Nuclear Wastes Control Act of 1990 (hazardous-waste / WEEE handling, DENR / EMB)
Republic Act No. 11898 — Extended Producer Responsibility Act of 2022 (producer responsibility, primarily plastic packaging; signals EPR direction)

summary.en: China's WEEE-equivalent framework is the Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council Order No. 551) and the associated WEEE catalogue, with a fund-based extended-producer-responsibility mechanism for listed product categories administered by environmental authorities. Producers of listed EEE pay into a WEEE treatment fund. The Chinese WEEE regime and the Philippine hazardous-waste / nascent EPR framework are separate; compliance in China does not satisfy Philippine end-of-life obligations.
summary.zh: 中国的 WEEE 对应框架为《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（国务院令第 551 号）及配套的 WEEE 目录，对目录内产品类别设有基于基金的生产者延伸责任机制，由环境主管部门管理。目录内 EEE 生产者须缴纳 WEEE 处理基金。中国 WEEE 制度与菲律宾有害废物 / 初步 EPR 框架相互独立；在中国的合规不满足菲律宾的产品报废义务。
summary.zht: 中國的 WEEE 對應框架為《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（國務院令第 551 號）及配套的 WEEE 目錄，對目錄內產品類別設有基於基金的生產者延伸責任機制，由環境主管部門管理。目錄內 EEE 生產者須繳納 WEEE 處理基金。中國 WEEE 制度與菲律賓有害廢物 / 初步 EPR 框架相互獨立；在中國的合規不滿足菲律賓的產品報廢義務。

standards_or_laws: State Council Order No. 551 — Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (China WEEE) and WEEE catalogue

gap.en: The Philippines handles end-of-life LED products primarily through hazardous-waste rules under RA 6969 rather than a dedicated lighting WEEE / EPR directive, while China uses a fund-based WEEE catalogue mechanism — the two are not equivalent and neither registration transfers. For the Philippine market, the exporter and its in-country importer should: (1) confirm whether the product or its end-of-life handling triggers hazardous-waste obligations (especially for any mercury-, lead-, or brominated-flame-retardant-bearing components); (2) plan for compliant disposal via DENR-accredited channels; (3) monitor the developing EPR landscape (RA 11898) for any future obligations extending to electronics/lighting. China WEEE fund payment does not discharge Philippine obligations, and Philippine importers may face the practical end-of-life burden domestically.
gap.zh: 菲律宾主要通过 RA 6969 下的有害废物规则处理报废 LED 产品，而非专门的照明 WEEE / EPR 指令，中国则采用基于基金的 WEEE 目录机制——两者不对等，且任一注册均不可转用。对于菲律宾市场，出口商及其本地进口商应：（1）确认产品或其报废处理是否触发有害废物义务（尤其是含汞、含铅或含溴化阻燃剂的组件）；（2）规划通过 DENR 认可渠道的合规处置；（3）关注正在发展的 EPR 格局（RA 11898）是否会产生未来延伸至电子/照明的义务。中国 WEEE 基金缴费不解除菲律宾义务，菲律宾进口商可能在本地承担实际的报废负担。
gap.zht: 菲律賓主要通過 RA 6969 下的有害廢物規則處理報廢 LED 產品，而非專門的照明 WEEE / EPR 指令，中國則採用基於基金的 WEEE 目錄機制——兩者不對等，且任一註冊均不可轉用。對於菲律賓市場，出口商及其本地進口商應：（1）確認產品或其報廢處理是否觸發有害廢物義務（尤其是含汞、含鉛或含溴化阻燃劑的組件）；（2）規劃通過 DENR 認可渠道的合規處置；（3）關注正在發展的 EPR 格局（RA 11898）是否會產生未來延伸至電子/照明的義務。中國 WEEE 基金繳費不解除菲律賓義務，菲律賓進口商可能在本地承擔實際的報廢負擔。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (hazardous-waste handling) — end-of-life LED products with hazardous components fall under RA 6969 hazardous-waste rules (DENR / EMB); no dedicated lighting WEEE / EPR directive yet, but EPR direction signalled by RA 11898
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for listed categories) — China WEEE fund / catalogue mechanism under State Council Order No. 551 applies to listed EEE producers

source.publisher: Environmental Management Bureau (EMB), Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR), Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Philippines regulates end-of-life LED products mainly through RA 6969 hazardous-waste rules (DENR / EMB) rather than a dedicated lighting WEEE / EPR directive, with the EPR Act (RA 11898) signalling a future direction. This differs from China's fund-based WEEE catalogue mechanism, and neither registration transfers. Exporters and their in-country importers should plan for compliant disposal of hazardous components (mercury, lead, brominated flame retardants) via DENR-accredited channels and monitor developing EPR obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾主要通过 RA 6969 有害废物规则（DENR / EMB）管理报废 LED 产品，而非专门的照明 WEEE / EPR 指令，《延伸生产者责任法》（RA 11898）显示出未来方向。这与中国基于基金的 WEEE 目录机制不同，且任一注册均不可转用。出口商及其本地进口商应规划通过 DENR 认可渠道合规处置有害组件（汞、铅、溴化阻燃剂），并关注发展中的 EPR 义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓主要通過 RA 6969 有害廢物規則（DENR / EMB）管理報廢 LED 產品，而非專門的照明 WEEE / EPR 指令，《延伸生產者責任法》（RA 11898）顯示出未來方向。這與中國基於基金的 WEEE 目錄機制不同，且任一註冊均不可轉用。出口商及其本地進口商應規劃通過 DENR 認可渠道合規處置有害組件（汞、鉛、溴化阻燃劑），並關注發展中的 EPR 義務。

requirement_topic.en: BPS ICC vs PS Mark and In-Country Importer of Record vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: BPS ICC 与 PS 标志及本地进口记录人 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: BPS ICC 與 PS 標誌及本地進口記錄人 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: For LED lamps and luminaires covered by the Philippine lighting technical regulation, market access runs through the Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) under the DTI: imported products obtain an Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) per importation/shipment (the ICC sticker is applied to the product), while locally manufactured products obtain a Philippine Standard (PS) Quality and/or Safety Certification Mark licence. The applicant must be an in-country entity — a Philippine-registered importer of record (for ICC) or local manufacturer (for PS); a foreign manufacturer cannot hold the clearance directly. The technical file supporting ICC / PS includes safety test reports to the applicable PNS IEC standards (PNS IEC 60598 luminaires, PNS IEC 62560 self-ballasted lamps), performance/energy evidence for the DOE label, and EMC where in scope. Test reports should come from a BPS-recognised (ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025) laboratory. Customs release of covered products is conditioned on a valid ICC.
summary.zh: 对于菲律宾照明技术法规涵盖的 LED 灯及灯具，市场准入通过 DTI 下属的菲律宾标准局（BPS）实现：进口产品按每次进口/批次取得进口商品清关（ICC）（ICC 标贴于产品上），本地制造产品取得菲律宾标准（PS）质量及/或安全认证标志许可。申请人须为本地实体——菲律宾注册的进口记录人（ICC）或本地制造商（PS）；外国制造商不能直接持有清关。支持 ICC / PS 的技术文件包括依据适用 PNS IEC 标准的安全检测报告（灯具 PNS IEC 60598、自镇流灯 PNS IEC 62560）、用于 DOE 标签的性能/能效证据，以及在适用范围内的 EMC。检测报告应来自 BPS 认可（ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）实验室。涵盖产品的海关放行以有效 ICC 为条件。
summary.zht: 對於菲律賓照明技術法規涵蓋的 LED 燈及燈具，市場准入通過 DTI 下屬的菲律賓標準局（BPS）實現：進口產品按每次進口/批次取得進口商品清關（ICC）（ICC 標貼於產品上），本地製造產品取得菲律賓標準（PS）質量及/或安全認證標誌許可。申請人須為本地實體——菲律賓註冊的進口記錄人（ICC）或本地製造商（PS）；外國製造商不能直接持有清關。支持 ICC / PS 的技術文件包括依據適用 PNS IEC 標準的安全檢測報告（燈具 PNS IEC 60598、自鎮流燈 PNS IEC 62560）、用於 DOE 標籤的性能/能效證據，以及在適用範圍內的 EMC。檢測報告應來自 BPS 認可（ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）實驗室。涵蓋產品的海關放行以有效 ICC 為條件。

standards_or_laws: BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) scheme — per-shipment clearance for imported covered products (BPS / DTI)
BPS Philippine Standard (PS) Quality / Safety Certification Mark — licence for locally manufactured covered products (BPS / DTI)

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and certified by CNCA-authorised bodies such as CQC (China Quality Certification Centre); voluntary CQC certification exists for products outside mandatory CCC. CCC is a manufacturer/product certification held directly by the producer, with factory inspection and ongoing surveillance. The Chinese CCC scheme and the Philippine BPS ICC / PS scheme are separate and non-mutual: CCC does not authorise import into the Philippines, and the Philippine clearance must be held by an in-country importer (ICC) or local manufacturer (PS), which is a different applicant model from China's direct-manufacturer CCC certificate.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为 CCC（中国强制性产品认证），由 CNCA 管理并由 CNCA 授权机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）认证；非强制 CCC 范畴的产品可申请自愿性 CQC 认证。CCC 是由生产者直接持有的制造商/产品认证，含工厂检查及持续监督。中国 CCC 方案与菲律宾 BPS ICC / PS 方案相互独立、不互认：CCC 不构成对进口菲律宾的授权，菲律宾清关须由本地进口记录人（ICC）或本地制造商（PS）持有，这与中国由制造商直接持证的 CCC 模式不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為 CCC（中國強制性產品認證），由 CNCA 管理並由 CNCA 授權機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）認證；非強制 CCC 範疇的產品可申請自願性 CQC 認證。CCC 是由生產者直接持有的製造商/產品認證，含工廠檢查及持續監督。中國 CCC 方案與菲律賓 BPS ICC / PS 方案相互獨立、不互認：CCC 不構成對進口菲律賓的授權，菲律賓清關須由本地進口記錄人（ICC）或本地製造商（PS）持有，這與中國由製造商直接持證的 CCC 模式不同。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA / CQC)
SRRC type approval — required separately for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: The Philippine ICC / PS scheme differs from China CCC in both applicant model and process: (1) a foreign manufacturer cannot hold the Philippine clearance directly — it needs a Philippine-registered importer of record (ICC) or a local manufacturing entity (PS), whereas CCC is held by the producer; (2) ICC is generally per-importation/shipment with the ICC sticker applied to the product, a different cadence from a one-time CCC certificate; (3) test reports must support the BPS file to the applicable PNS IEC standards (PNS IEC 60598 / 62560) from a BPS-recognised laboratory — China CCC reports are not automatically accepted; (4) customs release of covered products depends on a valid ICC. The two schemes are parallel and non-mutual, so a separate Philippine technical file, in-country importer arrangement, and BPS clearance are required regardless of existing CCC status.
gap.zh: 菲律宾 ICC / PS 方案在申请人模式及流程上均不同于中国 CCC：（1）外国制造商不能直接持有菲律宾清关——须有菲律宾注册的进口记录人（ICC）或本地制造实体（PS），而 CCC 由生产者持有；（2）ICC 一般按每次进口/批次办理并将 ICC 标贴于产品上，与一次性 CCC 证书的节奏不同；（3）检测报告须依据适用 PNS IEC 标准（PNS IEC 60598 / 62560）由 BPS 认可实验室出具以支持 BPS 文件——中国 CCC 报告不会被自动接受；（4）涵盖产品的海关放行取决于有效 ICC。两方案并行且不互认，因此无论现有 CCC 状态如何，均须单独准备菲律宾技术文件、本地进口商安排及 BPS 清关。
gap.zht: 菲律賓 ICC / PS 方案在申請人模式及流程上均不同於中國 CCC：（1）外國製造商不能直接持有菲律賓清關——須有菲律賓註冊的進口記錄人（ICC）或本地製造實體（PS），而 CCC 由生產者持有；（2）ICC 一般按每次進口/批次辦理並將 ICC 標貼於產品上，與一次性 CCC 證書的節奏不同；（3）檢測報告須依據適用 PNS IEC 標準（PNS IEC 60598 / 62560）由 BPS 認可實驗室出具以支持 BPS 文件——中國 CCC 報告不會被自動接受；（4）涵蓋產品的海關放行取決於有效 ICC。兩方案並行且不互認，因此無論現有 CCC 狀態如何，均須單獨準備菲律賓技術文件、本地進口商安排及 BPS 清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BPS ICC (imported) or PS mark (local manufacture) required for covered lighting products before customs release / sale; clearance must be held by an in-country importer of record or local manufacturer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry (DTI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for covered LED lamps and luminaires in the Philippines runs through the BPS ICC (per-shipment, for imports) or PS mark (for local manufacture), held by a Philippine in-country importer of record or local manufacturer — a foreign manufacturer cannot hold it directly. This differs from China CCC, which the producer holds directly, and the two are parallel and non-mutual. Test reports to PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 from a BPS-recognised laboratory must support the BPS file, and customs release of covered products depends on a valid ICC. A separate Philippine technical file and importer arrangement are required regardless of CCC status.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾涵盖类 LED 灯及灯具的市场准入通过 BPS ICC（进口，按批次）或 PS 标志（本地制造）实现，由菲律宾本地进口记录人或本地制造商持有——外国制造商不能直接持有。这与由生产者直接持有的中国 CCC 不同，且两者并行、不互认。须由 BPS 认可实验室出具依据 PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 的检测报告以支持 BPS 文件，涵盖产品的海关放行取决于有效 ICC。无论 CCC 状态如何，均须单独准备菲律宾技术文件及进口商安排。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓涵蓋類 LED 燈及燈具的市場准入通過 BPS ICC（進口，按批次）或 PS 標誌（本地製造）實現，由菲律賓本地進口記錄人或本地製造商持有——外國製造商不能直接持有。這與由生產者直接持有的中國 CCC 不同，且兩者並行、不互認。須由 BPS 認可實驗室出具依據 PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 的檢測報告以支持 BPS 文件，涵蓋產品的海關放行取決於有效 ICC。無論 CCC 狀態如何，均須單獨準備菲律賓技術文件及進口商安排。
